title: US-Iran peace deal remains elusive as Trump and Tehran trade conflicting claims
description: US president dismisses Iranian media reports agreement is close, despite earlier suggesting a deal could be signed this weekend
content:
Prospects for an immediate end to the war between Iran and the US remained uncertain on Friday amid a chaotic series of conflicting claims and counter-claims by US and Iranian officials about ongoing negotiations.

title: Arise, Sir Kevin: Sinfield knighted in king’s birthday honours list
description: Kevin Sinfield has promised to continue quest to support those living with MND after receiving a knighthood
content:
Kevin Sinfield has promised to continue his quest to support those living with motor neurone disease after being awarded a knighthood in the king’s birthday honours list.

title: Gene Shalit, popular US movie critic, has died aged 100
description: The moustachioed reviewer was a popular fixture in American households from the 1970s through to his retirement in 2010.
content:
Wisecracking veteran US movie critic Gene Shalit has died aged 100, his family has confirmed to his former network NBC.
